subject: Re: .tiff extention and/or symbolic link in Windows
body:
Dear Dimitry,

That's great! Thank you!
I am sorry, but one more thing:
JADAS changes the directory for every 1000 movie stacks like IMAGE/ for 1 - 
1000, IMAGE2/ for 1001 - 2000, IMAGE3/ for 2001 - 3000 and so on.
We just wonder if Warp can accept the wild card for the directory name as 
IMAGE*/ or if you could consider this in the next release.
Otherwise, we will use "mklink /H" following your advice. 
Thank you again.
Best regards,
Koji
